name: Korean Eggplant Salad
recipeIngredient: A few dashes Tabasco or Cayenne
Soy or oyster sauce to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Toast the sesame seeds by frying them in a few drops of vegetable oil on top of the stove (or baking slowly in an 200°F oven until they are brown).
2. Cover eggplant with boiling water; cook until barely tender. Drain, cool and peel; cut into julienne strips (½-inch long).
3. Mix oil, vinegar, sugar, garlic, sesame oil, Tabasco or Cayenne, and soy or oyster sauce in a bowl.
4. Pour the dressing over the eggplant; cover and refrigerate for 1 or 2 hours, allowing it to drain.
5. Serve with boiled or broiled fish or as part of a lettuce lunch.
